jobs.title: Allocator Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description:
## Descrizione
Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Allocator Intern for Napapijri.

## Key information
- **Start date:** June 1st, 2026
- **Duration:** 12 months, full-time
- **Gross monthly salary:** 1’850 CHF
- **Location:** VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland
- **Streamlined recruitment process:** 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case)

## Eligibility requirements
- **Graduation:** Must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR must have a student status as of June 2026
- **Citizenship:** Must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship

## Descrizione del ruolo
Napapijri is looking for an exceptional Allocator Intern to join our DTC (Direct To Consumer) team based in Stabio, Switzerland. As Allocator Intern you will support the development of our Owned & Operated Outlet and Full Price business. You will collaborate closely with the Merchandise Planner, Buyer, and Sales Team to ensure that inventory is managed to the planned constraints and business goals. You will have a direct impact on the day-by-day life of our teams and being accountable for performance monitoring to support informed decision. Get ready to make an impact!

## Responsibilities
- Supports Inventory Plans through the execution of initial seasonal inventory allocations and the weekly/daily replenishment activities
- Focus on store & Channels inventory levels
- STO (Stock Transfer Order) Management, Shipping delivery Schedule, Delivery Plans, back to DC management (in season and end of season) arranging pick-up with local couriers
- Performance & stock analysis to support planning team
- Contribute to historical data analysis, inventory and communication set up and results monitoring during Key Centre activations
- Contribute to properly set up promotions in the system
- Contribute to keep a constant communication flow with key stakeholders (Field, sales team,..)

## Skills
- **Education:** A University Bachelor or Master’s degree in Economic, Statistic, or related fields is required as a pre-requisite
- **Analytical Skills:** Strong analytical skills and knowledge. Previous experience in retail planning and/or allocation is preferred.
- **Technical Skills:** Advantage knowledge of Microsoft Excel. Ability to create reports that meet business needs and data-visualization dashboards
- **Communication:** Ability to analyse, present and communicate information in a manner that allows informed decision-making
- **Teamwork:** Trading mentality: ability to work in team maximising communication between different functions, challenge results and information to identify challenges, drive for results and be profit-focused.
- **Language Skills:** You are fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills

## Cosa offriamo
At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below:
- Consolidation of your analytical skills (improving trading capabilities & performance analysis)
- Manage a full allocation process from order creation to stock management
- Promotion planning & management (In Season & End of Season)
- Work in a dynamic DTC environment with an agile and adaptable team

The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience, including:
- Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project
- One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands
- Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership

We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy:
- Hybrid working policy
- 50% discount on VF brands
- On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives
- Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks
- Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location
- A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together

Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day.

## Contatto
Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances!
#readytoapply
R-20260218-0006

descriptionByLocale.it: ## Descrizione Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Allocatore Intern for Napapijri. ## Informazioni chiave - **Data di inizio:** 1º giugno 2026 - **Durata:** 12 mesi, tempo pieno - **Salario mensile netto:** 1’850 CHF - **Località:** VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - **Processo di selezione strutturato:** 3 interviste (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potenziale Business Case) ## Richieste di Eligibilità - **Graduazione:** Deve completare la laurea dopo il 1º maggio 2026 o avere uno stato di studente fino al giugno 2026 - **Cittadinanza:** Deve avere cittadinanza UE o EEA (Area Economica Europea) ## Descrizione del ruolo Napapijri sta cercando un Allocatore Intern eccezionale per unirsi al nostro team DTC (Direct To Consumer) basato a Stabio, Switzerland. Come Allocatore Intern, supporterai lo sviluppo del nostro Outlet Owned & Operated e del business Full Price. Collaborerai strettamente con il Planner di Merchandise, Buyer e Team di Vendite per assicurarti che l'inventario sia gestito alle restrizioni e agli obiettivi aziendali. Avrai un impatto diretto sulla vita quotidiana delle nostre squadre e sarai responsabile per il monitoraggio delle performance per supportare decisioni informate. Prepariamo a fare la differenza! ## Responsabilità - Supporta i piani di inventario attraverso l'esecuzione delle allocazioni stagionali iniziali e le attività di rifornimento settimanale/di giorno - Focus su livelli di inventario delle storie e dei canali - STO (Stock Transfer Order) Management, Programma di spedizione, Piani di consegna, gestione di ritorno al DC (in stagione e fine stagione) organizzando la raccolta con couriers locali - Analisi delle performance e dello stock per supportare il team di pianificazione - Contribuisci all'analisi dei dati storici, all'impostazione dell'inventario e della comunicazione e monitoraggio dei risultati durante le attivazioni del Key Centre - Contribuisci a impostare correttamente le promozioni nel sistema - Mantieni una comunicazione costante con i principali stakeholder (Campo, team di vendite, ...) ## Competenze - **Educazione:** Un Bachelor o Master in Economia, Statistica o campi correlati è richiesto come prerequisito - **Competenze Analitiche:** Forza analitica e conoscenza. Esperienza precedente in pianificazione e/o allocazione di retail è preferita. - **Competenze Tecniche:** Conoscenza avanzata di Microsoft Excel. Capacità di creare report che soddisfino le esigenze aziendali e dashboard di visualizzazione dei dati - **Comunicazione:** Capacità di analizzare, presentare e comunicare informazioni in modo che permetta decisioni informate - **Teamwork:** Mentale di commercio: capacità di lavorare in team massimizzando la comunicazione tra diverse funzioni, sfidare i risultati e le informazioni per identificare le sfide, cercare i risultati e essere profit-focused. - **Competenze Linguistiche:** Parla fluentemente inglese con eccellenti capacità di comunicazione verbale e scritta ## Cosa offriamo Al termine del periodo di internato, potrai aspettarti di avere una chiara comprensione dei seguenti: - Consolidamento delle tue competenze analitiche (improving trading capabilities & performance analysis) - Gestione di un processo di allocazione completo dall'ordine di creazione alla gestione dello stock - Pianificazione e gestione delle promozioni (In Stagione & Fine Stagione) - Lavoro in un ambiente DTC dinamico con un team agile e adattabile Il Programma di Internato EMEA di VF è un viaggio di 12 mesi progettato per sviluppare e empower le nuove talenti all'inizio delle loro carriere. Siamo impegnati a svelare il tuo potenziale, quindi puoi aspettarti un percorso di apprendimento strutturato e ricco di esperienza pratica, inclusi: - Workshop di formazione dedicati e progetti di consulenza interni - Un giorno di lavoro in-store per ottenere reali insights sui nostri brand - Opportunità di networking con pari e leadership senior Non possiamo garantire che l'internato porti a un contratto dopo, ma grazie al valore dell'esperienza la maggior parte dei nostri internati rimangono nella società dopo il periodo di internato. Poiché vogliamo che tu ti concentri su ciò che conta, offriamo benefici che incoraggiano il benessere mentale, fisico e finanziario. Ti offriremo: - Politica di lavoro flessibile - 50% sconto sui brand VF - Gym on-site, offrendo iniziative di salute e benessere - Canteen subsidizzato, oltre a aree di riposo che offrono bevande gratuite - Bus shuttle all'ufficio o sconto sul trasporto pubblico, a seconda della tua località - Una comunità di internati vivace, con persone di diverse origini, stili di vita e nazionalità che lavorano insieme Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging Come azienda di opportunità uguali, cerchiamo di creare una cultura di appartenenza basata su rispetto, connessione, apertura e autenticità. Siamo impegnati a costruire e mantenere un ambiente di lavoro che celebra la diversità dei nostri associati, permettendo loro di portare le loro autentiche identità al lavoro ogni giorno. ## Contatto Sei pronto? Applica ora – l'applicazione anticipata aumenta le tue probabilità! #readytoapply R-20260218-0006
descriptionByLocale.de: ## Beschreibung Se du bist ein Träumer und möchtest die Welt verändern, dann melde dich bei #VFInternshipProgram in unserem EMEA-Hauptsitz in Stabio, Schweiz, als Allocator-Intern für Napapijri. ## Wichtige Informationen - **Startdatum:** 1. Juni 2026 - **Dauer:** 12 Monate, Vollzeit - **Bruttogehalt:** 1’850 CHF - **Standort:** VF EMEA Hauptsitz in Stabio, Schweiz - **Strukturierter Einstellungsprozess:** 3 Interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potenzieller Business Case) ## Eligibilitätsanforderungen - **Abitur:** Muss nach dem 1. Mai 2026 abschließen oder muss bis Juni 2026 als Student gelten - **Staatsangehörigkeit:** Muss EU- oder EEA-Staatsangehörigkeit (Europäische Wirtschaftsgemeinschaft) haben ## Rollenbeschreibung Napapijri sucht einen außergewöhnlichen Allocator-Intern, um unser DTC (Direct To Consumer)-Team in Stabio, Schweiz, zu unterstützen. Als Allocator-Intern unterstützt du die Entwicklung unseres Owned & Operated Outlet und Full Price-Geschäfts. Du arbeitest eng mit dem Merchandise Planner, Buyer und dem Verkaufsteam zusammen, um sicherzustellen, dass das Lager nach den geplanten Einschränkungen und Geschäftsziele verwaltet wird. Du hast einen direkten Einfluss auf den täglichen Alltag unserer Teams und bist für die Überwachung der Leistung verantwortlich, um fundierte Entscheidungen zu unterstützen. Bereite dich auf eine Veränderung vor! ## Verantwortlichkeiten - Unterstützt die Lagerpläne durch die Durchführung der initialen saisonalen Lagerzuweisungen und der wöchentlichen/daily Nachfüllungsaktivitäten - Fokus auf Lager- und Kanallagerstände - STO (Stock Transfer Order) Management, Lieferungsschedule, Lieferungspläne, Rückführung an DC (in Saison und Saisonende) und Abholung mit lokalen Frachtunternehmen - Leistungs- und Lageranalyse, um die Planungsgruppe zu unterstützen - Beitritt zur historischen Datenanalyse, Lager- und Kommunikationsaufstellung und Ergebnisseüberwachung während der Key Centre-Aktivierungen - Beitritt zur korrekten Einstellung von Promotions im System - Aufrechterhaltung einer kontinuierlichen Kommunikationsflüssigkeit mit Schlüsselstakeholdern (Feld, Verkaufsteam, ...) ## Fähigkeiten - **Bildung:** Ein Universitäts-Bachelor oder Master in Wirtschaft, Statistik oder verwandten Bereichen ist ein Vorraussetzung - **Analytische Fähigkeiten:** Starke analytische Fähigkeiten und Kenntnisse. Vorherige Erfahrung in Retail-Planning und/oder -Allocation ist bevorzugt. - **Technische Fähigkeiten:** Vorteilhafte Kenntnisse von Microsoft Excel. Fähigkeit, Berichte zu erstellen, die die Geschäftsbedürfnisse erfüllen und Datenvisualisierungsdashboards - **Kommunikation:** Fähigkeit, Informationen zu analysieren, darzustellen und zu kommunizieren, um fundierte Entscheidungen zu ermöglichen - **Teamarbeit:** Handelsgeist: Fähigkeit, in Teams zu arbeiten, um die Kommunikation zwischen verschiedenen Funktionen zu maximieren, Ergebnisse und Informationen zu hinterfragen, um Herausforderungen zu identifizieren, Ergebnisse zu erreichen und profitorientiert zu sein. - **Sprachkenntnisse:** Du sprichst fließend Englisch mit hervorragenden verbalen und schriftlichen Kommunikationsfähigkeiten ## Was wir bieten Am Ende der Internship-Periode kannst du auf eine klare Verständnis der folgenden Punkte erwarten: - Verbesserte analytische Fähigkeiten (Verbesserung der Handelsfähigkeiten & Performanceanalyse) - Verwaltung eines vollständigen Allokationsprozesses von Bestellungserstellung bis Stockmanagement - Promotionsplanung und -verwaltung (In Saison & Saisonende) - Arbeit in einer dynamischen DTC-Umgebung mit einem agilen und anpassungsfähigen Team Das VF EMEA Internship-Programm ist ein 12-monatiger Weg, der darauf abzielt, sich neue Talente zu entwickeln und zu fördern, die am Anfang ihrer Karriere stehen. Wir sind bestrebt, dein Potenzial zu entfalten, sodass du auf eine strukturierte Lernpfad und reiche praktische Erfahrung, einschließlich: - Dedicierte Fähigkeitsbildungsworkshops und interne Beratungsgruppenprojekte - Ein Tag im Laden, um realen Einblick in unsere Marken zu erhalten - Netzwerkchancen mit Gleichaltrigen und Führungskräften Wir können nicht garantieren, dass die Internship zu einem Vertrag führen wird, aber aufgrund des Wertes der Erfahrung bleiben die meisten unserer Internen nach dem Internship-Periode in der Gesellschaft. Da wir darauf abzielen, dass du dich auf das Wichtige konzentrierst, bieten wir umfassende Benefits, die das mentale, physische und finanzielle Wohlbefinden fördern. Du wirst: - Flexible Arbeitszeit - 50% Rabatt auf VF-Marken - Fitnessstudio auf dem Standort, das Gesundheits- und Wohlbefinden-Initiativen bietet - Subsidierter Canteen, sowie Freizeiträume, die kostenlose Getränke anbieten - Shuttlebus zum Büro oder Rabatt auf öffentlichen Verkehrsmitteln, je nach deiner Lage - Eine lebendige Intern-Community, mit Menschen aus verschiedenen Hintergründen, Lebensstilen und Nationalitäten, die zusammenarbeiten Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging Als gleichberechtigter Arbeitgeber streben wir danach, eine Kultur der Zugehörigkeit zu schaffen, die auf Respekt, Verbindung, Offenheit und Authentizität basiert. Wir sind bestrebt, eine Arbeitsumgebung zu schaffen und aufrechtzuerhalten, die die Vielfalt unserer Mitarbeiter feiert, ihnen die Möglichkeit gibt, ihre echte Identität am Arbeitsplatz jeden Tag zu tragen. ## Kontakt Bist du bereit? Melde dich jetzt an – frühe Anmeldung erhöht deine Chancen! #readytoapply R-20260218-0006
descriptionByLocale.fr: ## Description Sois un rêveur, fais la différence! Rejoins #VFInternshipProgram dans notre siège EMEA à Stabio, Suisse, en tant qu'Allocateur-Intern pour Napapijri. ## Informations clés - **Date de début:** 1er juin 2026 - **Durée:** 12 mois, temps plein - **Salaire mensuel brut:** 1’850 CHF - **Emplacement:** VF EMEA Headquarters à Stabio, Suisse - **Processus de recrutement structuré:** 3 entretiens (Recruteur, Hiring Manager, potentiel Business Case) ## Conditions d'éligibilité - **Graduation:** Doit terminer son diplôme après le 1er mai 2026 ou avoir un statut étudiant jusqu'en juin 2026 - **Nationalité:** Doit avoir la nationalité UE ou EEA (Area Économique Européenne) ## Description du poste Napapijri recherche un Allocateur-Intern exceptionnel pour rejoindre notre équipe DTC (Direct To Consumer) basée à Stabio, Suisse. En tant qu'Allocateur-Intern, vous soutiendrez le développement de notre Outlet Owned & Operated et du business Full Price. Vous travaillerez en étroite collaboration avec le Planner de Merchandise, Acheteur et Équipe de Vente pour vous assurer que l'inventaire est géré selon les contraintes planifiées et les objectifs de l'entreprise. Vous aurez un impact direct sur la vie quotidienne de nos équipes et serez responsable du suivi des performances pour soutenir les décisions éclairées. Préparez-vous à faire une différence! ## Responsabilités - Soutien aux plans d'inventaire par l'exécution des allocations saisonnières initiales et des activités de ravitaillement hebdomadaire/journalier - Focus sur les niveaux d'inventaire des magasins et des canaux - Gestion STO (Stock Transfer Order), Plan de livraison, Plans de livraison, retour au DC (en saison et à la fin de la saison) en organisant la collecte avec des couriers locaux - Analyse des performances et des stocks pour soutenir l'équipe de planification - Contribution à l'analyse des données historiques, à l'établissement de l'inventaire et de la communication, ainsi qu'au suivi des résultats pendant les activations du Key Centre - Contribution à la mise en place correcte des promotions dans le système - Maintenance d'un flux de communication constant avec les parties prenantes clés (Campagne, équipe de vente, ...) ## Compétences - **Éducation:** Un Bachelor ou Master en Économique, Statistique ou domaines connexes est requis comme prérequis - **Compétences analytiques:** Compétences analytiques et connaissances. Expérience précédente en planification et/ou allocation de la vente est préférée. - **Compétences techniques:** Connaissance avancée de Microsoft Excel. Capacité à créer des rapports qui répondent aux besoins de l'entreprise et des tableaux de bord de visualisation des données - **Communication:** Capacité à analyser, présenter et communiquer des informations de manière à permettre des décisions éclairées - **Travail en équipe:** Mentalité commerciale: capacité à travailler en équipe en maximisant la communication entre différentes fonctions, en défiant les résultats et les informations pour identifier les défis, en cherchant des résultats et en étant profit-focused. - **Compétences linguistiques:** Vous parlez fluement anglais avec de très bonnes compétences de communication verbale et écrite ## Ce que nous offrons À la fin de la période d'internat, vous pourrez attendre une compréhension claire des éléments suivants: - Consolidation de vos compétences analytiques (amélioration des capacités de trading & analyse de la performance) - Gestion d'un processus d'allocation complet de la création de commande à la gestion du stock - Planification et gestion des promotions (En saison & à la fin de la saison) - Travail dans un environnement DTC dynamique avec une équipe agile et adaptable Le Programme d'Internat EMEA de VF est un voyage de 12 mois conçu pour développer et élever les nouvelles talents au début de leurs carrières. Nous sommes engagés à libérer votre potentiel, donc vous pouvez attendre un parcours d'apprentissage structuré et riche en expérience pratique, y compris: - Ateliers de formation dédiés et projets de consultation internes - Un jour de travail en magasin pour obtenir des insights réels sur nos marques - Opportunités de réseautage avec des pairs et des leaders seniors Nous ne pouvons pas garantir que l'internat mènera à un contrat après, mais grâce à la valeur de l'expérience, la plupart de nos stagiaires restent dans l'entreprise après la période d'internat. Puisque nous voulons que vous vous concentrez sur ce qui compte, nous offrons des avantages qui encouragent le bien-être mental, physique et financier. Vous bénéficierez: - Politique de travail hybride - 50% de réduction sur les marques VF - Gym sur site, offrant des initiatives de santé et de bien-être - Canteen subsidisé, ainsi que des espaces de détente offrant des boissons gratuites - Bus shuttle vers le bureau ou réduction sur le transport public, selon votre localisation - Une communauté d'internes dynamique, avec des personnes de divers horizons, styles de vie et nationalités qui travaillent ensemble Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging En tant qu'employeur d'opportunités égales, nous cherchons à créer une culture d'appartenance basée sur le respect, la connexion, l'ouverture et l'authenticité. Nous sommes engagés à construire et à maintenir un environnement de travail qui célèbre la diversité de nos employés, leur permettant de porter leur identité authentique au travail chaque jour. ## Contact Prêt à partir? Appliquez dès maintenant – l'application anticipée augmente vos chances! #readytoapply R-20260218-0006

jobs.title: Allocator Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description:
## Descrizione
Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Allocator Intern for Vans. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com .

## Informazioni chiave
- Start date: June 1st, 2026
- Duration: 12 months , full-time
- Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF
- Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland
- Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case)

## Requisiti di ammissibilità
- You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026
- You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship

## Mansioni
Let’s talk about the role! We are looking for a Allocator intern to join VANS within VF EMEA Internship Program. In this role, you will provide support to the Allocation Team:
- By taking an active role in analysing performance and sales trend.
- Monitoring deliveries, maintaining adequate stock levels.
- Taking care of replenishment / initial allocation for O&O EMEA Stores.
- Developing and maintaining reports and tools finding the best way to make them efficient and useful for the team.

## Requisiti
How you will make a difference You should be an analytical, resilient and curious team player, being:
- Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills.
- Passionate for numbers with strong analytical skills: accuracy and attention to details is a must.
- Proficient in Microsoft Excel. Knowledge of any BI platform will be considered as a plus (eg: Power BI).
- Eager to learn and face up new challenges.
- Proactive in order to achieve yours and your team goals.
- First experiences such as other internships, extracurricular activities, is considered as a plus

## Cosa offriamo
What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below:
- Learn about Vans’ trends and main logics of Retail Merchandising.
- Learn logics of inventory management, sales analysis, and allocation strategies.
- Learn to work with a wide team of internal stakeholder.

The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including:
- Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project
- One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands
- Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership

We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period.

Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy:
- Hybrid working policy
- 50% discount on VF brands
- On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives
- Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks
- Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location
- A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together.

## Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging
As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day.

## Contatto
Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260205-0007

descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Allocator Intern for Vans. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . ## Informazioni chiave - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) ## Requisiti di ammissibilità - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship ## Mansioni Let’s talk about the role! We are looking for a Allocator intern to join VANS within VF EMEA Internship Program. In this role, you will provide support to the Allocation Team: - By taking an active role in analysing performance and sales trend. - Monitoring deliveries, maintaining adequate stock levels. - Taking care of replenishment / initial allocation for O&O EMEA Stores. - Developing and maintaining reports and tools finding the best way to make them efficient and useful for the team. ## Requisiti How you will make a difference You should be an analytical, resilient and curious team player, being: - Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills. - Passionate for numbers with strong analytical skills: accuracy and attention to details is a must. - Proficient in Microsoft Excel. Knowledge of any BI platform will be considered as a plus (eg: Power BI). - Eager to learn and face up new challenges. - Proactive in order to achieve yours and your team goals. - First experiences such as other internships, extracurricular activities, is considered as a plus ## Cosa offriamo What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Learn about Vans’ trends and main logics of Retail Merchandising. - Learn logics of inventory management, sales analysis, and allocation strategies. - Learn to work with a wide team of internal stakeholder. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. ## Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. ## Contatto Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260205-0007
descriptionByLocale.it: ## Descrizione Sii un sognatore, fa’ la differenza! Entra a far parte del #VFInternshipProgram presso la nostra sede EMEA di Stabio, Svizzera, come Tirocinante Allocator per Vans. A proposito di VF VF sta ridefinendo il significato di essere la migliore azienda al mondo di abbigliamento, calzature ed equipaggiamento, alimentando marchi iconici del lifestyle attivo tra cui The North Face®, Vans® e Timberland®. Scopri di più su http://vfc.com . ## Informazioni chiave - Data di inizio: 1 giugno 2026 - Durata: 12 mesi, full-time - Salario mensile lordo: 1.850 CHF - Sede: Quartier generale EMEA VF a Stabio, Svizzera - Processo di selezione snello: 3 colloqui (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potenziale Business Case) ## Requisiti di ammissibilità - Ti devi laureare dopo il 1° maggio 2026 OPPURE devi avere status di studente a giugno 2026 - Devi possedere cittadinanza UE o SEE (Spazio Economico Europeo) ## Mansioni Parliamo del ruolo! Cerchiamo un tirocinante Allocator da inserire in VANS all’interno del Programma di tirocinio VF EMEA. In questo ruolo fornirai supporto al Team Allocation: - Assumendo un ruolo attivo nell’analisi delle performance e dei trend di vendita. - Monitorando le consegne, mantenendo livelli di scorte adeguati. - Occupandati del replenishment / allocazione iniziale per gli store O&O EMEA. - Sviluppando e mantenendo report e strumenti, trovando il modo migliore per renderli efficienti e utili per il team. ## Requisiti Come farai la differenza Dovresti essere un giocatore di squadra analitico, resiliente e curioso, essendo: - Fluente in inglese con ottime capacità comunicative orali e scritte. - Appassionato di numeri con forti capacità analitiche: precisione e attenzione ai dettagli sono fondamentali. - Competente in Microsoft Excel. La conoscenza di qualsiasi piattaforma BI sarà considerata un plus (es. Power BI). - Desideroso di imparare e affrontare nuove sfide. - Proattivo per raggiungere i tuoi obiettivi e quelli del team. - Prime esperienze come altri tirocini, attività extracurricolari, sono considerate un plus ## Cosa offriamo Cosa offriamo per te Al termine del periodo di tirocinio puoi aspettarti di avere chiara la comprensione di quanto segue: - Imparare i trend di Vans e le logiche principali del Retail Merchandising. - Imparare le logiche della gestione dell’inventario, analisi delle vendite e strategie di allocazione. - Imparare a lavorare con un ampio team di stakeholder interni. Il Programma di tirocinio VF EMEA è un percorso di 12 mesi pensato per sviluppare e responsabilizzare i talenti emergenti all’inizio della loro carriera. Ci impegniamo a liberare il tuo potenziale, quindi puoi aspettarti un percorso di apprendimento strutturato e un’esperienza pratica ricca, tra cui: - Workshop dedicati allo sviluppo delle competenze e progetto di consulenza interna di gruppo - Una giornata di lavoro in negozio per ottenere insight reali sui nostri marchi - Opportunità di networking con coetanei e senior leadership Non possiamo garantire che il tirocinio ti porti a un contratto successivo, ma grazie al valore dell’esperienza la maggior parte dei nostri tirocinanti resta in azienda dopo il periodo di tirocinio. Poiché vogliamo che tu ti concentri su ciò che conta, offriamo benefit completi che incoraggiano il benessere mentale, fisico e finanziario. Godrai di: - Politica di lavoro ibrido - Sconto 50% sui marchi VF - Palestra in sede, con iniziative di salute e benessere - Mensa agevolata e aree relax con bevande gratuite - Navetta per l’ufficio o sconto sui trasporti pubblici, in base alla tua posizione - Una comunità di tirocinanti vivace, con persone di background, stili di vita e nazionalità diversi che amano lavorare insieme. ## Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging In quanto datore di lavoro pari opportunità, ci impegniamo a promuovere una cultura dell’appartenenza basata su rispetto, connessione, apertura e autenticità. Siamo impegnati a costruire e mantenere un ambiente di lavoro che celebri la diversità dei nostri collaboratori, permettendo loro di portare il loro sé autentico al lavoro ogni giorno. ## Contatto Sei pronto?
descriptionByLocale.de: ## Beschreibung Sei ein Träumer, mach den Unterschied! Mach beim #VFInternshipProgram in unserer EMEA-Zentrale in Stabio, Schweiz, als Allocator Praktikant für Vans mit. Über VF VF definiert neu, was es bedeutet, das weltweit beste Bekleidungs-, Schuh- und Ausrüstungsunternehmen zu sein, und gibt ikonischen Active-Lifestyle-Marken wie The North Face®, Vans® und Timberland® neue Kraft. Erfahre mehr unter http://vfc.com . ## Wichtige Informationen - Startdatum: 1. Juni 2026 - Dauer: 12 Monate, Vollzeit - Bruttomonatslohn: 1.850 CHF - Standort: VF EMEA Hauptsitz in Stabio, Schweiz - Straffes Recruiting: 3 Interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, möglicher Business Case) ## Teilnahmevoraussetzungen - Du musst nach dem 1. Mai 2026 deinen Abschluss machen ODER im Juni 2026 Student*in sein - Du musst die Staatsangehörigkeit eines EU- oder EWR-Staates besitzen ## Aufgaben Lass uns über die Rolle sprechen! Wir suchen einen Allocator Praktikanten für VANS innerhalb des VF EMEA Praktikumsprogramms. In dieser Rolle unterstützt du das Allocation-Team: - Indem du aktiv bei der Analyse von Performance und Verkaufstrends mitwirkst. - Lieferungen überwachst und angemessene Lagerbestände aufrechterhältst. - Dich um Nachschub / Erstauslieferung für O&O EMEA Stores kümmerst. - Reports und Tools entwickelst und pflegst, um sie für das Team effizient und nützlich zu gestalten. ## Anforderungen Wie du den Unterschied machst Du solltest ein analytischer, belastbarer und neugieriger Teamplayer sein: - Fließend in Englisch mit ausgezeichneten mündlichen und schriftlichen Kommunikationsfähigkeiten. - Leidenschaft für Zahlen mit starken analytischen Fähigkeiten: Genauigkeit und Liebe zum Detail sind Pflicht. - Versiert in Microsoft Excel. Kenntnisse in BI-Plattformen sind ein Plus (z. B. Power BI). - Lernbereit und bereit, neue Herausforderungen anzugehen. - Proaktiv, um deine und die Teamziele zu erreichen. - Erste Erfahrungen wie andere Praktika, außerschulische Aktivitäten sind von Vorteil ## Was wir bieten Was du für dich erwartest Am Ende des Praktikums kannst du folgende Kenntnisse erwarten: - Lernen der Vans-Trends und Grundlogiken des Retail Merchandising. - Lernen der Logiken des Bestandsmanagements, der Verkaufsanalyse und Allokationsstrategien. - Lernen der Zusammenarbeit mit einem breiten Team interner Stakeholder. Das VF EMEA Praktikumsprogramm ist eine 12-monatige Reise, die darauf ausgelegt ist, aufstrebende Talente zu Beginn ihrer Karriere zu entwickeln und zu befähigen. Wir setzen uns dafür ein, dein Potenzial zu entfalten, daher erwartet dich ein strukturierter Lernpfad und reiche praktische Erfahrung, u. a.: - Spezielle Skill-Building-Workshops & internes Beratungsgruppenprojekt - Ein Tag Arbeit im Store, um echte Einblicke in unsere Marken zu gewinnen - Networking-Möglichkeiten mit Gleichgesinnten und der Senior-Führung Wir können nicht garantieren, dass das Praktikum zu einem anschließenden Vertrag führt, doch dank des wertvollen Erlebnisses bleiben die meisten unserer Praktikant*innen nach der Praktikumszeit im Unternehmen. Da wir möchten, dass du dich auf das Wesentliche konzentrierst, bieten wir umfassende Benefits, die geistiges, körperliches und finanzielles Wohlbefinden fördern. Du profitierst von: - Hybrid-Arbeitsmodell - 50 % Rabatt auf VF-Marken - Vor-Ort-Fitnessstudio mit Gesundheits- und Well-Being-Angeboten - Subventionierte Kantine sowie Lounge-Bereiche mit kostenlosen Getränken - Shuttle-Bus ins Büro oder Rabatt auf öffentliche Verkehrsmittel, je nach Standort - Einer lebendigen Praktikant*innen-Community mit Menschen unterschiedlichster Hintergründe, Lebensstile und Nationalitäten, die gerne zusammenarbeiten. ## Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging Als Chancengleichheits-Arbeitgeber streben wir danach, eine Kultur des Zugehörigseins auf Basis von Respekt, Verbindung, Offenheit und Authentizität zu fördern. Wir setzen uns dafür ein, einen Arbeitsplatz aufzubauen und zu erhalten, der die Vielfalt unserer Mitarbeitenden feiert und es ihnen erlaubt, jeden Tag ihren authentischen Selbst zur Arbeit zu bringen. ## Kontakt Bist du dabei? Bewirb dich jetzt – eine frühzeitige Bewerbung erhöht deine Chancen! #readytoapply R-20260205-0007
descriptionByLocale.fr: ## Description Sois un rêveur, fais la différence ! Rejoins le #VFInternshipProgram dans notre siège EMEA à Stabio, Suisse, en tant que stagiaire Allocator pour Vans. À propos de VF VF redéfinit ce que signifie être la meilleure entreprise mondiale de vêtements, chaussures et équipements, en dynamisant des marques iconiques de style de vie actif telles que The North Face®, Vans® et Timberland®. En savoir plus sur http://vfc.com . ## Informations clés - Date de début : 1er juin 2026 - Durée : 12 mois, temps plein - Salaire mensuel brut : 1 850 CHF - Lieu : Siège EMEA de VF à Stabio, Suisse - Processus de recrutement simplifié : 3 entretiens (Recruteur, Hiring Manager, potentiel Business Case) ## Conditions d’admissibilité - Tu dois obtenir ton diplôme après le 1er mai 2026 OU avoir le statut d’étudiant en juin 2026 - Tu dois posséder la citoyenneté UE ou EEE (Espace Économique Européen) ## Missions Parlons du poste ! Nous recherchons un(e) stagiaire Allocator pour rejoindre VANS dans le cadre du Programme de stage VF EMEA. Dans ce rôle, tu apporteras ton soutien à l’équipe Allocation : - En jouant un rôle actif dans l’analyse des performances et des tendances de vente. - En surveillant les livraisons, en maintenant des niveaux de stock adéquats. - En t’occupant du réapprovisionnement / allocation initiale pour les magasins O&O EMEA. - En développant et maintenant des rapports et outils, en trouvant le meilleur moyen de les rendre efficaces et utiles pour l’équipe. ## Exigences Comment tu feras la différence Tu dois être un(e) joueur(se) d’équipe analytique, résilient(e) et curieux(se), en étant : - Courant(e) en anglais avec d’excellentes compétences verbales et écrites. - Passionné(e) par les chiffres avec de solides compétences analytiques : la précision et le souci du détail sont indispensables. - Compétent(e) dans Microsoft Excel. La connaissance de toute plateforme BI sera considérée comme un plus (ex. : Power BI). - Désireux(-se) d’apprendre et de relever de nouveaux défis. - Proactif(-ive) afin d’atteindre tes objectifs et ceux de ton équipe. - Les premières expériences telles que d’autres stages, activités parascolaires, sont considérées comme un plus ## Ce que nous offrons Ce que tu y gagnes À l’issue du stage, tu peux t’attendre à bien comprendre : - Les tendances Vans et les logiques principales du merchandising de détail. - Les logiques de gestion des stocks, d’analyse des ventes et des stratégies d’allocation. - Travailler avec une large équipe de parties prenantes internes. Le Programme de stage VF EMEA est un parcours de 12 mois conçu pour développer et responsabiliser les talents émergents au début de leur carrière. Nous nous engageons à libérer ton potentiel, tu peux donc t’attendre à un parcours d’apprentissage structuré et à une riche expérience pratique, incluant : - Ateliers dédiés au renforcement des compétences & projet de conseil interne en groupe - Une journée de travail en magasin pour obtenir de vrais insights sur nos marques - Opportunités de networking avec des pairs et la direction senior Nous ne pouvons pas garantir que le stage débouchera sur un contrat par la suite, mais grâce à la valeur de l’expérience, la plupart de nos stagiaires restent dans l’entreprise après la période de stage. Comme nous voulons que tu te concentres sur l’essentiel, nous offrons des avantages complets qui encouragent le bien-être mental, physique et financier. Tu bénéficieras de : - Politique de travail hybride - 50 % de remise sur les marques VF - Salle de sport sur place, proposant des initiatives santé et bien-être - Restaurant subventionné, ainsi que des espaces détente offrant des boissons gratuites - Navette pour le bureau ou remise sur les transports publics, selon ta localisation - Une communauté dynamique de stagiaires, avec des personnes d’origines, de modes de vie et de nationalités diverses qui aiment travailler ensemble. ## Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging En tant qu’employeur garantissant l’égalité des chances, nous nous efforçons de favoriser une culture de l’appartenance fondée sur le respect, la connexion, l’ouverture et l’authenticité. Nous nous engageons à construire et maintenir un lieu de travail qui célèbre la diversité de nos collaborateurs, leur permettant d’apporter leur moi authentique au travail chaque jour. ## Contact Tu es prêt(e) ? Postule dès maintenant – une candidature anticipée augmente tes chances ! #readytoapply R-20260205-0007

jobs.title: Paid Media & SEO Coordinator (Maternity Cover)
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description:
## Descrizione

Napapijri is looking for a Paid Media & SEO Coordinator (Fixed Term Maternity Cover) to join our team based in Stabio, Switzerland. Let’s Talk about the Role You as Paid Media & SEO Coordinator (Maternity Cover) will support the planning, implementation and monitoring of the Digital Marketing activities for the Brand. You will be responsible for digital campaigns planning, ensuring that Paid Media and Organic Search activities support the entire customer journey, in alignment with business and marketing objectives.

## Mansioni

- Executing the Brand’s paid media strategy across all the funnel stages: Upper Funnel (Awareness) to sustain Brand visibility, Mid Funnel (Consideration) to drive traffic the website and Lower Funnel (Conversion) through conversion-focused channels (PPC, Paid Social and Affiliates).
- Managing day-to-day operational needs for paid media campaigns together with our media agency partner with a hands-on operational approach, ensuring spend optimization.
- Coordinating with the colleagues of the Marketing team (Creative, Content, PR & Communications) to amplify key brand moments, ensuring an integrated communication strategy
- Working closely with the eCommerce team, aligning on commercial targets to be reached through media optimization, conversion rate optimization initiatives, and key product strategies.
- Developing and executing an integrated SEO strategy, with the support of our SEO agency partner, to improve the organic visibility of our website.
- Reporting on campaigns to provide actionable insights and monitor/improve campaign performance across all the relevant KPIs.

## Requisiti

- The capability to allocate budget strategically across funnel stages and media channels according to business objectives, performance data and business seasonality
- Understanding of the dynamics of the different paid media channels and SEO fundamentals, ensuring synergy between paid and organic
- Hands-on professional knowledge of main Digital Marketing platforms (Google Ads, Meta Business Manager, DV360, Google Search Console)
- Proficiency with web analytics tools such as Google Analytics.
- The ability to create and present effective and accurate reports and presentations.
- Excellent communication and writing skills in English.
- A formal education and subsequent University Bachelor or Master’s degree in Marketing & Communications are nice to have, but we are most interested in your total experience and professional achievements.
- The ideal candidate has at least 1 year of experience in managing paid media campaigns, ideally with a Paid Media agency and /or eCommerce background.

## Cosa offriamo

- Be part of iconic lifestyle brands
- Join a multi brand and multi countries organization to drive you career forward
- International and challenging working culture
- On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives
- Discount 50% on all VF brands
- Subsidized canteen as well as break out areas offering complimentary hot drinks

## Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity

As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day.

## About VF

VF is a global apparel company connecting people to the lifestyles they cherish through our family of iconic brands. At the heart of our journey lies our purpose: We power movements of sustainable and active lifestyles for the betterment of people and our planet. This is our purpose. It’s the reason we come to work every day. Our purpose unites us and leads us to pursue our goals, together. This is our calling. Learn more at http://vfc.com

## Contatto

If you like what you have read and want to join our team then we would like to hear from you!
#readytoapply
R-20260123-0013

descriptionByLocale.it: Napapijri cerca un Coordinatore Paid Media & SEO (Copertura Maternità) da inserire nel nostro team a Stabio, Svizzera. Parliamo del Ruolo Il tuo ruolo di Coordinatore Paid Media & SEO (Copertura Maternità) prevede il supporto alla pianificazione, implementazione e monitoraggio delle attività di Digital Marketing per il Brand. Sarai responsabile della pianificazione delle campagne digitali, assicurando che le attività di Paid Media e Organic Search supportino l'intero percorso del cliente, in linea con gli obiettivi aziendali e di marketing. ## Mansioni - Esecuzione della strategia Paid Media del Brand in tutte le fasi del funnel: Upper Funnel (Consapevolezza) per sostenere la visibilità del Brand, Mid Funnel (Considerazione) per generare traffico al sito web e Lower Funnel (Conversione) attraverso canali focalizzati sulle conversioni (PPC, Paid Social e Affiliati). - Gestione delle esigenze operative quotidiane per le campagne Paid Media insieme al nostro partner agenzia media, con un approccio operativo hands-on, assicurando l'ottimizzazione degli investimenti. - Collaborazione con i colleghi del team Marketing (Creativo, Contenuti, PR & Comunicazione) per amplificare i momenti chiave del Brand, garantendo una strategia di comunicazione integrata. - Lavoro stretto con il team e-commerce, allineandosi sugli obiettivi commerciali da raggiungere attraverso l'ottimizzazione dei media, l'ottimizzazione del tasso di conversione e le strategie chiave dei prodotti. - Sviluppo ed esecuzione di una strategia SEO integrata, con il supporto del nostro partner agenzia SEO, per migliorare la visibilità organica del nostro sito web. - Reporting sulle campagne per fornire insight azionabili e monitorare/migliorare le prestazioni delle campagne in base agli indicatori chiave. ## Requisiti - Capacità di allocare il budget in modo strategico in base alle fasi del funnel e ai canali mediatici, in base agli obiettivi aziendali, ai dati di prestazione e alla stagionalità aziendale. - Comprensione delle dinamiche dei diversi canali Paid Media e dei fondamenti SEO, garantendo sinergia tra pagati e organici. - Conoscenza professionale hands-on delle principali piattaforme di Digital Marketing (Google Ads, Meta Business Manager, DV360, Google Search Console). - Competenza negli strumenti di analisi web come Google Analytics. - Capacità di creare e presentare report e presentazioni efficaci e accurati. - Ottime capacità di comunicazione e scrittura in inglese. - Un'istruzione formale e un titolo universitario di Bachelor o Master in Marketing & Comunicazione sono un plus, ma siamo più interessati alla tua esperienza totale e ai tuoi traguardi professionali. - Il candidato ideale ha almeno 1 anno di esperienza nella gestione di campagne Paid Media, preferibilmente con esperienza in un'agenzia Paid Media e/o nel settore e-commerce. ## Cosa offriamo - Fai parte di marchi lifestyle iconici - Unisciti a un'organizzazione multi-brand e multi-paese per far avanzare la tua carriera - Cultura lavorativa internazionale e stimolante - Palestra in sede con iniziative per salute e benessere - Sconto del 50% su tutti i marchi VF - Cucina sussidiata e aree di sosta con bevande calde gratuite ## Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity Come datore di lavoro con uguaglianza di opportunità, ci sforziamo di promuovere una cultura di appartenenza basata su rispetto, connessione, apertura e autenticità. Siamo impegnati a costruire e mantenere un ambiente di lavoro che celebra la diversità dei nostri associati, permettendo loro di portare la loro autentica identità ogni giorno. ## Su VF VF è un'azienda globale di abbigliamento che connette le persone agli stili di vita che amano attraverso la famiglia dei nostri marchi iconici. Al centro del nostro percorso c'è il nostro scopo: Promuoviamo movimenti di stili di vita sostenibili e attivi per il bene delle persone e del nostro pianeta. Questo è il nostro scopo. È il motivo per cui ci alziamo ogni giorno. Il nostro scopo ci unisce e ci guida a perseguire i nostri obiettivi, insieme. Questa è la nostra chiamata. Scopri di più su http://vfc.com ## Contatto Se ti piace ciò che hai letto e vuoi unirti al nostro team, vorremmo sentire da te! #readytoapply R-20260123-0013

You will be responsible for digital campaigns planning, ensuring that Paid Media and Organic Search activities support the entire customer journey, in alignment with business and marketing objectives. ## Mansioni - Executing the Brand’s paid media strategy across all the funnel stages: Upper Funnel (Awareness) to sustain Brand visibility, Mid Funnel (Consideration) to drive traffic the website and Lower Funnel (Conversion) through conversion-focused channels (PPC, Paid Social and Affiliates). - Managing day-to-day operational needs for paid media campaigns together with our media agency partner with a hands-on operational approach, ensuring spend optimization. - Coordinating with the colleagues of the Marketing team (Creative, Content, PR & Communications) to amplify key brand moments, ensuring an integrated communication strategy - Working closely with the eCommerce team, aligning on commercial targets to be reached through media optimization, conversion rate optimization initiatives, and key product strategies. - Developing and executing an integrated SEO strategy, with the support of our SEO agency partner, to improve the organic visibility of our website. - Reporting on campaigns to provide actionable insights and monitor/improve campaign performance across all the relevant KPIs. ## Requisiti - The capability to allocate budget strategically across funnel stages and media channels according to business objectives, performance data and business seasonality - Understanding of the dynamics of the different paid media channels and SEO fundamentals, ensuring synergy between paid and organic - Hands-on professional knowledge of main Digital Marketing platforms (Google Ads, Meta Business Manager, DV360, Google Search Console) - Proficiency with web analytics tools such as Google Analytics. - The ability to create and present effective and accurate reports and presentations. - Excellent communication and writing skills in English. - A formal education and subsequent University Bachelor or Master’s degree in Marketing & Communications are nice to have, but we are most interested in your total experience and professional achievements. - The ideal candidate has at least 1 year of experience in managing paid media campaigns, ideally with a Paid Media agency and /or eCommerce background. ## Cosa offriamo - Be part of iconic lifestyle brands - Join a multi brand and multi countries organization to drive you career forward - International and challenging working culture - On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives - Discount 50% on all VF brands - Subsidized canteen as well as break out areas offering complimentary hot drinks ## Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. ## About VF VF is a global apparel company connecting people to the lifestyles they cherish through our family of iconic brands. At the heart of our journey lies our purpose: We power movements of sustainable and active lifestyles for the betterment of people and our planet. This is our purpose. It’s the reason we come to work every day. Our purpose unites us and leads us to pursue our goals, together. This is our calling. Learn more at http://vfc.com ## Contatto If you like what you have read and want to join our team then we would like to hear from you! #readytoapply R-20260123-0013
descriptionByLocale.de: Napapijri sucht eine Bezahlte Medien- und SEO-Koordinatorin (Elternzeitvertretung) für unser Team in Stabio, Schweiz. Sprechen wir über die Rolle Als Bezahlte Medien- und SEO-Koordinatorin (Elternzeitvertretung) unterstützen Sie die Planung, Umsetzung und Überwachung der Digital-Marketing-Aktivitäten für die Marke. Sie sind verantwortlich für die Planung der digitalen Kampagnen, um sicherzustellen, dass Bezahlte Medien und Suchmaschinenoptimierung den gesamten Kundenweg unterstützen, im Einklang mit den Geschäfts- und Marketingzielen. ## Tätigkeiten - Umsetzung der Paid-Media-Strategie der Marke in allen Phasen des Funnels: Upper Funnel (Bewusstsein), um die Sichtbarkeit der Marke zu stärken, Mid Funnel (Überlegung), um den Website-Traffic zu steigern, und Lower Funnel (Konversion) über konversionsorientierte Kanäle (PPC, Bezahlte Social Media und Affiliates). - Tägliche Betreuung der operativen Anforderungen für Paid-Media-Kampagnen gemeinsam mit unserem Medienagentur-Partner mit einem hands-on-Ansatz, um die Ausgaben zu optimieren. - Zusammenarbeit mit den Kolleg:innen des Marketing-Teams (Kreativ, Inhalt, PR & Kommunikation), um wichtige Markenmomente zu verstärken und eine integrierte Kommunikationsstrategie sicherzustellen. - Nahe Zusammenarbeit mit dem E-Commerce-Team, um sich auf die zu erreichenden Geschäftsziele abzustimmen, durch Media-Optimierung, Conversion-Rate-Optimierung und Schlüsselproduktstrategien. - Entwicklung und Umsetzung einer integrierten SEO-Strategie mit Unterstützung unseres SEO-Agentur-Partners, um die organische Sichtbarkeit unserer Website zu verbessern. - Berichterstattung über Kampagnen, um handelbare Einsichten zu liefern und die Leistung der Kampagnen anhand der relevanten KPIs zu überwachen und zu verbessern. ## Anforderungen - Fähigkeit, den Budget strategisch nach Funnelfasen und Medienkanälen zu verteilen, basierend auf Geschäftszielen, Leistungsdaten und Geschäftszyklen. - Verständnis der Dynamiken der verschiedenen Bezahlmedienkanäle und der Grundlagen der SEO, um Synergien zwischen bezahlten und organischen Kanälen sicherzustellen. - Hands-on-Professionelles Wissen über die wichtigsten Digital-Marketing-Plattformen (Google Ads, Meta Business Manager, DV360, Google Search Console). - Kompetenz in Web-Analyse-Tools wie Google Analytics. - Fähigkeit, effektive und genaue Berichte und Präsentationen zu erstellen und zu präsentieren. - Exzellente Kommunikations- und Schreibfähigkeiten in Englisch. - Ein formelles Bildungsabschluss und ein Bachelor- oder Master-Abschluss in Marketing & Kommunikation sind von Vorteil, aber wir interessieren uns am meisten für Ihre gesamte Erfahrung und beruflichen Erfolge. - Der ideale Kandidat hat mindestens 1 Jahr Erfahrung in der Verwaltung von Paid-Media-Kampagnen, idealerweise mit Erfahrung in einer Paid-Media-Agentur und/oder E-Commerce-Hintergrund. ## Was wir bieten - Teil der ikonischen Lifestyle-Marken sein - Ein multibrand und multinationaler Arbeitgeber, der Ihre Karriere vorantreibt - Internationale und herausfordernde Arbeitskultur - On-site-Gym mit Gesundheits- und Wohlbefindensinitiativen - 50% Rabatt auf alle VF-Marken - Subventionierte Kantine sowie Ausgangsflächen mit kostenlosen Heißgetränken ## Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity Als Arbeitgeber mit Chancengleichheit streben wir eine Kultur des Zusammengehörens an, die auf Respekt, Verbindung, Offenheit und Authentizität basiert. Wir sind uns verpflichtet, einen Arbeitsplatz zu schaffen und zu erhalten, der die Vielfalt unserer Mitarbeiter:innen feiert und es ihnen ermöglicht, ihre authentische Selbst zu bringen, jeden Tag. ## Über VF VF ist ein globaler Bekleidungshersteller, der Menschen mit den Lebensstilen verbindet, die sie lieben, durch unsere Familie ikonischer Marken. Im Mittelpunkt unseres Weges steht unser Zweck: Wir fördern Bewegungen nachhaltiger und aktiver Lebensstil für das Wohl der Menschen und unseres Planeten. Dies ist unser Zweck. Der Grund, warum wir jeden Tag zur Arbeit kommen. Unser Zweck vereint uns und führt uns an, unsere Ziele gemeinsam zu verfolgen. Dies ist unsere Berufung. Erfahren Sie mehr unter http://vfc.com ## Kontakt Wenn Ihnen das gelesen hat gefallen und Sie Teil unseres Teams werden möchten, melden Sie sich bei uns! #readytoapply R-20260123-0013
descriptionByLocale.fr: Napapijri recherche un(e) Coordinateur(e) Paid Media & SEO (Couverture de congé maternité) à intégrer notre équipe à Stabio, en Suisse. Parlons de votre rôle En tant que Coordinateur(e) Paid Media & SEO (Couverture de congé maternité), vous serez chargé(e) d'assister à la planification, à la mise en œuvre et au suivi des activités de Digital Marketing pour la marque. Vous serez responsable de la planification des campagnes numériques, en veillant à ce que les activités Paid Media et Organic Search soutiennent l'ensemble du parcours client, conformément aux objectifs commerciaux et marketing. ## Missions - Mise en œuvre de la stratégie Paid Media de la marque à travers toutes les étapes du funnel : Upper Funnel (Connaissance) pour renforcer la visibilité de la marque, Mid Funnel (Considération) pour générer du trafic vers le site web et Lower Funnel (Conversion) via des canaux axés sur les conversions (PPC, Paid Social et Affiliés). - Gestion des besoins opérationnels quotidiens pour les campagnes Paid Media avec notre partenaire agence média, avec une approche opérationnelle hands-on, en veillant à l'optimisation des dépenses. - Collaboration avec les collègues du service Marketing (Création, Contenu, PR & Communication) pour amplifier les moments clés de la marque, en assurant une stratégie de communication intégrée. - Travailler étroitement avec l'équipe e-commerce, en s'alignant sur les objectifs commerciaux à atteindre via l'optimisation des médias, l'optimisation du taux de conversion et les stratégies clés de produits. - Développer et exécuter une stratégie SEO intégrée, avec l'appui de notre partenaire agence SEO, afin d'améliorer la visibilité organique de notre site web. - Rédiger des rapports sur les campagnes pour fournir des analyses actionnables et surveiller/améliorer les performances des campagnes selon les indicateurs clés. ## Exigences - Capacité à allouer le budget de manière stratégique selon les étapes du funnel et les canaux médias, en fonction des objectifs commerciaux, des données de performance et de la saisonnalité commerciale. - Compréhension des dynamiques des différents canaux Paid Media et des bases SEO, en assurant la synergie entre payants et organiques. - Connaissance professionnelle hands-on des principales plateformes de Digital Marketing (Google Ads, Meta Business Manager, DV360, Google Search Console). - Maîtrise des outils d'analyse web tels que Google Analytics. - Capacité à créer et présenter des rapports et présentations efficaces et précis. - Excellentes compétences en communication et rédaction en anglais. - Un diplôme universitaire formel (Bachelor ou Master) en Marketing & Communication est un atout, mais nous sommes surtout intéressés par votre expérience totale et vos réalisations professionnelles. - Le candidat idéal a au moins 1 an d'expérience dans la gestion de campagnes Paid Media, idéalement avec une expérience dans une agence Paid Media et/ou un background e-commerce. ## Ce que nous offrons - Faire partie de marques lifestyle iconiques - Rejoindre une organisation multi-marques et multinationale pour faire progresser votre carrière - Culture de travail internationale et stimulante - Salle de sport sur site avec initiatives santé et bien-être - Réduction de 50 % sur toutes les marques VF - Cantine subventionnée ainsi que des espaces de détente avec boissons chaudes gratuites ## Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity En tant qu'employeur engagé dans l'égalité des chances, nous nous efforçons de promouvoir une culture d'appartenance basée sur le respect, la connexion, l'ouverture et l'authenticité. Nous nous engageons à construire et à maintenir un lieu de travail qui célèbre la diversité de nos collaborateurs, leur permettant de ramener leur véritable soi chaque jour. ## À propos de VF VF est une entreprise mondiale de vêtements qui connecte les gens aux styles de vie qu'ils chérissent par notre famille de marques iconiques. Au cœur de notre parcours se trouve notre mission : Nous soutenons les mouvements de styles de vie durables et actifs pour le bien des personnes et de notre planète. C'est notre mission. La raison pour laquelle nous nous levons chaque jour. Notre mission nous unit et nous guide dans la poursuite de nos objectifs, ensemble. C'est notre vocation. En savoir plus sur http://vfc.com ## Contact Si ce que vous avez lu vous plaît et que vous souhaitez rejoindre notre équipe, nous aimerions vous entendre ! #readytoapply R-20260123-0013

jobs.title: Influencer Marketing Coordinator - THE NORTH FACE
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: The North Face EMEA is looking for a Influencer Marketing Coordinator to join our Communications Marketing team based in Stabio, Switzerland. Live the Brand The North Face is the premier exploration company in the world. We spark curiosity. We dare to disrupt. We create communities. And we lead with integrity. We are a community of explorers and are constantly looking for new ideas, places and people to connect with. The Influencer Marketing Coordinator plays a key role in shaping and executing The North Face’s influencer strategy across EMEA. This role is responsible for managing and growing our network of talents, content creators, and cultural ambassadors, ensuring compelling, authentic storytelling that drives brand relevance and business impact. You will work collaboratively across Brand, Creative, and eComm teams to create and deliver influencer campaigns that connect The North Face with new and existing audiences. The ideal candidate is both creative and data-driven - someone who can identify talent, build long-term relationships, execute holistic campaigns, and measure performance with precision. What You Will Do Influencer Strategy & Campaign Execution - Support the development and execution of influencer marketing strategies aligned with brand and seasonal priorities. - Identify, evaluate, and onboard new creators who align with brand values across performance, outdoor, lifestyle, and cultural segments. - Coordinate influencer partnerships from briefing, contract negotiation, and product seeding through to content delivery and reporting. - Collaborate with agencies and internal teams to ensure campaigns are delivered on time, on budget, and on brand. Community & Relationship Management - Manage The North Face’s existing influencer and ambassador networks, nurturing long-term relationships built on authenticity and shared values. - Drive the evolution of the Explorer Team to broaden continuous reach and engagement. - Stay ahead of industry shifts, emerging platforms, and creator trends to continuously refresh our community mix. Project Management - End‑to‑end project management for campaigns, including timelines, deliverables, briefing, tracking progress, and ensuring all assets are delivered on time and aligned with brand expectations. - Drive cross‑functional alignment for influencer projects, ensuring milestones and campaign objectives are met through effective planning and communication. - Oversee the workflow of influencer content production. Skills for Success - Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field. - Experience: 2–4 years of experience in influencer marketing, digital marketing, or social-driven campaigns, ideally within fashion, sports, or lifestyle. - Passion for influencer culture and content creation, with strong aesthetic sensibility and brand awareness. - Analytical skills: experience in influencer management and analytics platforms as well as an analytical mindset to interpret performance data and assess campaign impact. - Skilled communicator and relationship builder who thrives in fast-paced, cross-functional environments. - Organized, detail-oriented, and proactive in managing multiple projects simultaneously. What's in it for you? - Be part of iconic lifestyle brands - Join a multi brand and multi countries organization to drive you career forward - International and challenging working culture - On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives - Discount 50% on all VF brands - Subsidized canteen as well as break out areas offering complimentary hot drinks Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Join the North Face Family The North Face is the premier exploration company in the world. Founded in the counterculture of Berkeley, CA in 1966 we have a long and storied legacy of enabling exploration, loving and protecting wild places, and creating iconic and technically advanced product. We believe that exploration is a mindset – both on the mountain and off the mountain – and it infuses everything we do. As a community of explorers, we stay curious about new ideas, places and people. #Readytoapply R-20260123-0007

titleByLocale.en: Influencer Marketing Coordinator - THE NORTH FACE
titleByLocale.it: Influencer Marketing Coordinator - THE NORTH FACE
titleByLocale.de: Influencer Marketing Coordinator - THE NORTH FACE
titleByLocale.fr: Influencer Marketing Coordinator - THE NORTH FACE

descriptionByLocale.it: The North Face EMEA è alla ricerca di un Coordinatore di Marketing degli Influencer per unirsi al nostro team di Marketing delle Comunicazioni con sede a Stabio, Svizzera. Vivi la Marcia La North Face è la società di esplorazione leader a livello mondiale. Noi accendiamo la curiosità. Noi corriamo il rischio di innovare. Noi creiamo comunità. E noi ci guidiamo con integrità. Noi siamo una comunità di esploratori e siamo sempre alla ricerca di nuove idee, luoghi e persone con cui connetterci. Il Coordinatore di Marketing degli Influencer gioca un ruolo chiave nella definizione e nell'esecuzione della strategia di marketing degli influencer di The North Face nell'EMEA. Questo ruolo è responsabile della gestione e dello sviluppo della nostra rete di talenti, creatori di contenuti e ambasciatori culturali, assicurandosi che la narrazione sia coinvolgente, autentica e che abbia un impatto sulle vendite e sulla rilevanza del marchio. Lavorerai in collaborazione con i team di Brand, Creative e eComm per creare e distribuire campagne di influencer che connettano The North Face con nuove e esistenti audience. L'ideale candidato è sia creativo che orientato ai dati - qualcuno che possa identificare il talento, costruire relazioni a lungo termine, eseguire campagne olistiche e misurare il loro rendimento con precisione. Cosa farai Strategia e Esecuzione dei Campi di Influencer - Supporterai la definizione e l'esecuzione delle strategie di marketing degli influencer in linea con le priorità del marchio e delle stagioni. - Identifica, valuta e onora nuovi creatori che si allineano ai valori del marchio nei segmenti di prestazione, outdoor, lifestyle e cultura. - Coordinerai le partnership degli influencer dalla briefing, dalla negoziazione del contratto e dalla fornitura di prodotti fino alla consegna del contenuto e alla relazione. - Collaborerai con le agenzie e i team interni per assicurarti che le campagne siano consegnate in tempo, entro il budget e in linea con il marchio. Gestione della Comunità e delle Relazioni - Gestirai la rete di influencer e ambasciatori della North Face, nutrendo relazioni a lungo termine costruite sull'autenticità e sui valori condivisi. - Guida l'evoluzione dell'Explorer Team per ampliare la portata continua e l'impegno. - Resta in anticipo rispetto alle tendenze dell'industria, alle nuove piattaforme e alle tendenze dei creatori per rinnovare continuamente il mix della comunità. Gestione dei Progetti - Gestione dei progetti end-to-end per le campagne, compresi i tempi, i risultati, le briefing, la tracciatura del progresso e l'assicurazione che tutti gli asset siano consegnati in tempo e in linea con le aspettative del marchio. - Guida l'allineamento interfunzionale per i progetti degli influencer, assicurando che i punti di svolta e gli obiettivi delle campagne siano raggiunti attraverso una pianificazione efficace e comunicazione. - Sovraintenderai il flusso di produzione del contenuto degli influencer. Competenze per il Successo - Educazione: laurea in Marketing, Comunicazioni o un campo correlato. - Esperienza: 2-4 anni di esperienza in marketing degli influencer, marketing digitale o campagne social-driven, ideale all'interno dell'abbigliamento, dello sport o del lifestyle. - Passione per la cultura degli influencer e la creazione di contenuti, con una forte sensibilità estetica e consapevolezza del marchio. - Competenze analitiche: esperienza nella gestione degli influencer e piattaforme di analisi, nonché un mindset analitico per interpretare i dati di prestazione e valutare l'impatto delle campagne. - Comunicatore e relazionista abile che prospera in ambienti veloci e interfunzionali. - Organizzato, dettagliato e proattivo nel gestire progetti multipli contemporaneamente. Cosa ti aspetta? - Partecipa a marchi lifestyle iconici - Unisciti a un'organizzazione multibrand e multinazionale per guidare la tua carriera - Cultura di lavoro internazionale e sfidante - Palestra in loco offrendo iniziative per la salute e il benessere - Sconto del 50% su tutti i marchi VF - Cucina sussidiata nonché aree di pausa offrendo bevande calde gratuite Libero di Essere, Inclusione e Diversità Come datore di lavoro uguale, ci sforziamo di creare una cultura di appartenenza basata sul rispetto, sulla connessione, sull'apertura e sull'autenticità. Siamo impegnati a costruire e mantenere un luogo di lavoro che celebri la diversità dei nostri associati, consentendo loro di portare le loro autentiche personalità al lavoro ogni giorno. Unisciti alla Famiglia della North Face La North Face è la società di esplorazione leader a livello mondiale. Fondato nella controcultura di Berkeley, CA nel 1966, abbiamo una lunga e storica eredità di abilitazione dell'esplorazione, amore e protezione dei luoghi selvaggi, e creazione di prodotti iconici e tecnologicamente avanzati. Crediamo che l'esplorazione sia un mindset – sia sulle montagne che fuori dalle montagne – e lo infondiamo in tutto ciò che facciamo. Come comunità di esploratori, restiamo curiosi su nuove idee, luoghi e persone. #Pronto a Candidarti R-20260123-0007
